problem id: 5028d953
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(2)

examples:
  01101101 -> 00011011
  11010111 -> 00110101
  01100100 -> 00011001
  10011001 -> 00100110
  00101101 -> 00001011
  10100110 -> 00101001
  00011010 -> 00000110
  00001101 -> 00000011

query: 01000001
predicted answer: 00010000
